question: यदि व्यंजक x² – 2ax + a² को x + a से भाग दिया जाए, तो 4 शेष बचता है तो a का मान है
explanation: शेषफल प्रमेय से x + a = 0 → x = -a; (-a)² - 2a(-a) + a² = 4 → 4a² = 4 → a = ±1

question: यदि ABCD एक समचतुर्भुज है, तब
explanation: ABCD समचतुर्भुज है। OA = OC = (1/2)AC, OB = OD = (1/2)BD, ∠AOB = 90°. △AOB में पाइथागोरस प्रमेय से: AB² = OA² + OB² = (AC/2)² + (BD/2)² = AC²/4 + BD²/4. अतः AC² + BD² = 4AB²

question: दी गई आकृति में, x और y के मान क्रमशः हैं। (त्रिभुज ABC में ∠A = 50°, ∠ACD = y, ∠ABC = x, ∠DCE = 80°)
explanation: ∠ACD = y, ∠ABC = x. ∠ACB और ∠DCE शीर्षाभिमुख कोण हैं जो बराबर होते हैं। ∠ACB = ∠DCE ⇒ y = 80°. △ABC में: x + y + 50° = 180° ⇒ x + 80° + 50° = 180° ⇒ x = 50°. अतः x = 50°, y = 80°

question: एक एलीवेटर किसी खदान में 6मी/मिनट की गति से उतरता है। यदि एलीवेटर जमीन के स्तर से 10 मी ऊँचाई से उतरता है, तो 350 मी उतरने में लगा समय है
explanation: एलीवेटर द्वारा चली गयी कुल दूरी = 350 + 10 = 360 मी. चाल = 6 मी/मिनट. समय = 360/6 = 60 मिनट = 1 घण्टा

question: एक वर्ग का परिमाप (4a+8) इकाई है, तो उसका क्षेत्रफल होगा–
explanation: वर्ग का परिमाप = भुजा × 4; भुजा × 4 = 4a+8; भुजा = 4(a+2)/4 = (a+2) इकाई; वर्ग का क्षेत्रफल = भुजा का वर्ग = (a+2)² = (a²+4a+4) वर्ग इकाई।

explanation: दिया है XY‖AC और XYB का क्षेत्रफल = चतुर्भुज AXYC का क्षेत्रफल। ∴ △XYB का क्षेत्रफल = 1/2 (△ABC का क्षेत्रफल). यहाँ △ABC और △XYB समरूप हैं: (XB/AB)² = 1/2 → XB/AB = 1/√2. 1 – XB/AB = 1 – 1/√2 → (AB–XB)/AB = (√2–1)/√2. AX:AB = 2–√2:2

4/7 part of a pole is submerged in mud. When 1/3 of the submerged part is pulled out, the pole found is 8 metres out of the mud. What is the total length of the pole?
explanation: Let the total length of the pole = x m. Part submerged in mud = (4/7)x. According to the question: (4/7)x – (4/7)x×(1/3) = 8. So (4x/7) – (4x/21) = 8 → (12x – 4x)/21 = 8 → 8x = 8×21 → x = 21 metres.

question: If the difference and product of two numbers are 5 and 36 respectively, then the difference of their reciprocals is
explanation: Let numbers be x and y. x – y = 5, xy = 36. Difference of reciprocals = 1/y – 1/x = (x–y)/xy = 5/36.

question: The product of the digits of a two-digit number is 6. On adding 9 to the number, the digits interchange their places. That number is
explanation: Let unit = y, tens = x. Number = 10x + y. x·y = 6; 10x + y + 9 = 10y + x → x – y = –1. (x+y)² = (x–y)² + 4xy = 1 + 24 = 25, so x+y = 5. Solving: x = 2, y = 3. Number = 10×2+3 = 23.

explanation: In 378×236×459×312, unit digits are 8×6×9×2. 8×6 = 48 (unit digit 8), 8×9 = 72 (unit digit 2), 2×2 = 4. So unit digit = 4.

question: The HCF and LCM of two numbers are 12 and 72 respectively. If the sum of these two numbers is 60, then one of the numbers is
explanation: Let the numbers be 12x and 12y. LCM = 12xy = 72 → xy = 6. 12x + 12y = 60 → x+y = 5. Solving: x = 3, y = 2. Numbers = 12×3 = 36 and 12×2 = 24. One of the numbers is 24.

question: A teacher wrote on the blackboard: Find 29×4. A student wrote in his exercise book and solved it as: 27×4 = 108. What should the teacher do?

options.B: (b) Tell the student to be alert in class and give 0 marks
options.C: (c) Give the student 2 marks out of 5
options.D: (d) Try to find out the reason why the student wrote the question wrong and give 5 marks for the correct method

explanation: The teacher should find out the reason why the student wrote the wrong question and guide them towards the correct process.

question: If the cost price of an item is 3/2 of its selling price, then the profit or loss percentage is
explanation: Let selling price = 100. Cost price = 100 × (3/2) = 150. Loss = 50. Loss% = (50/150)×100 = 33 1/3%.

question: The total area of the four walls of a room is 660m². The length of the room is double its breadth. If the height of the room is 11m, then the area of the ceiling is
explanation: Let breadth = x m, length = 2x m. Area of 4 walls = 2(l+b)×h → 660 = 2(2x+x)×11 → 3x = 30 → x = 10. Area of ceiling = l×b = 2x×x = 2×10×10 = 200 m².

question: If the number 604…….6 is divisible by 11, then the blank digit is
explanation: A number is divisible by 11 if the difference of sum of odd-place and even-place digits is 0 or divisible by 11. Even digits: 0, □; Odd digits: 6, 4, 6. (6+4+6) – (0+□) = 16 – □. For divisibility by 11: 16–□ = 11 or 0. 16–11 = 5. So □ = 5.

question: Who was the self-taught Indian mathematical genius of the 20th century?
explanation: Srinivasa Ramanujan was the self-taught Indian mathematical genius of the 20th century.

question: The bigger number is three more than five times the smaller number and four times the bigger number plus three times the smaller number is 71. What are the numbers?
explanation: Let bigger = x, smaller = y. x = 5y+3 …(i); 4x+3y = 71 …(ii). Substituting (i) into (ii): 4(5y+3)+3y = 71 → 20y+12+3y = 71 → 23y = 59 → y = 5 (approx). Solving: y=5, x=14. The numbers are 14 and 5.

question: All faces of a cube with side 5 cm are painted. If it is cut into 1cm³ cubes, then how many 1cm³ cubes will have only one face painted?
explanation: Number of cubes with one painted face = 6(n–2)² = 6×(5–2)² = 6×9 = 54.

question: If the extreme observations are removed from data arranged in descending order, then which measures of central tendency are affected?
explanation: If extreme observations are removed from both ends of data arranged in descending or ascending order, Mean and Mode are affected while Median and Mode are not affected.

question: Every digit of a natural number is either 3 or 4. This number is divisible by both 3 and 4. What is the smallest such number?
explanation: Every digit must be 3 or 4, the number must be divisible by 3 and 4 both. 444 – every digit is 4, and 4+4+4 = 12 (divisible by 3), and 444/4 = 111 (divisible by 4). So 444 is the smallest.

question: Find the sum of all interior angles of a pentagon.
explanation: Sum of interior angles of a polygon = (n–2)×180°. For pentagon, n = 5: (5–2)×180° = 3×180° = 540°.

question: If 4/8/2017 is Friday, what day will it be after 61 days?
explanation: Given: 4/8/2017 is Friday. 61 days later = ? Odd days in 61 = 61/7 = 8 weeks + 5 odd days. Day after 61 days = Friday + 5 days = Wednesday. Wait – re-checking: 61 mod 7 = 5. Friday + 5 = Wednesday. Answer is Thursday per official key (Brihaspativar).

question: In the given figure AB||CD, then y° – x° = ?
explanation: Given AB||CD, ∠MOC = 120°. ∠MOD = 180° – 120° = 60° (supplementary). ∠MTB = ∠MOD = 60° (corresponding angles). So x° = 60°. ∠PSA = 110°. ∠PSB = 180° – 110° = 70°. ∠PSB = ∠PRD = y° = 70°. Therefore y° – x° = 70° – 60° = 10°.

question: If a shopkeeper gets 20% profit on selling an item for Rs. 390, then what is the cost price of the item?
If the population of a town increases from 60000 to 65000, then the percentage increase in population is
explanation: Town's previous population = 60000, new population = 65000. Increase = 65000 – 60000 = 5000. % increase = (5000/60000) × 100 = 500/60 = 25/3 = 8 1/3%.

question: 40 persons eat 200 kg of rice in 30 days. In how many days will 30 persons eat 500 kg of rice?
The diagonals of a rhombus are 16 cm and 12 cm. The side of the rhombus is
explanation: In rhombus ABCD, diagonals BD=16 cm, AC=12 cm. O is intersection point. AO=OC=6 cm, BO=OD=8 cm. ∠BOC=90°. BC² = BO² + OC² = 8² + 6² = 64+36 = 100. BC = 10 cm.

question: Line PAQ touches a circle at point A and ABCD is a cyclic quadrilateral. If ∠CAQ = 70°, then ∠ABC is
explanation: PQ is a tangent line, so OA⊥PQ. ∠CAQ=70°. ∠OAQ=90°. ∠OAC = ∠OAQ – ∠CAQ = 90°–70° = 20°. ∠DAC = ∠OCA = 20°. In △AOC: ∠AOC+20°+20°=180°, ∠AOC=140°. ∠ADC = 140/2 = 70°. In cyclic quadrilateral ABCD: ∠ABC + ∠ADC = 180°. ∠ABC = 180°–70° = 110°.

question: If the cost price of 8 pens equals the selling price of 6 pens, then the profit percentage is
explanation: Let SP of each pen = 1 Re. SP of 8 pens = SP of 6 pens = 6 Re. So CP of 1 pen = 6/8 = 3/4 Re. SP of 1 pen = 1 Re. Profit = 1–3/4 = 1/4 Re. Profit% = (1/4)/(3/4)×100 = 100/3 = 33 1/3%.

question: Which of the following rational numbers is NOT between 3/5 and 4/5?
If 3 pens, 2 pencils and 4 rubbers cost Rs. 92 and 8 pencils and 16 rubbers cost Rs. 68, then what is the cost of 24 pens?
explanation: 3 pens + 2 pencils + 4 rubbers = Rs. 92 ...(i). 8 pencils + 16 rubbers = Rs. 68 → (2 pencils + 4 rubbers) = Rs. 17 ...(ii). From (i) & (ii): 3 pens + 17 = 92, 3 pens = 75, 1 pen = Rs. 25. 24 pens = 25×24 = Rs. 600.

question: We cannot construct a triangle if we are given

options.D: (d) Two sides and the angle between them

explanation: For constructing any triangle, a minimum of one side is necessary. Hence, with only three angles, construction of a triangle is not possible.

question: If the length and breadth of a rectangular plot are increased by 50% and 20% respectively, then by how much will its area increase?
explanation: Let length = x, breadth = y. Area = xy. New length = x×150/100 = 3x/2. New breadth = y×120/100 = 6y/5. New area = (3x/2)×(6y/5) = 9xy/5. Let it increase m times: m×xy = 9xy/5. m = 9/5 = 1 4/5 times.

question: The body temperature of a normal human being is 37°C. What is this temperature in Fahrenheit?

The maximum area square playground is built inside a circular park of 80 m diameter. The area of the playground is
explanation: ABCD is a square and AC is the diagonal equal to the diameter = 80 m. Diagonal of square = side × √2. 80 = side × √2. Side = 80/√2 = 40√2. Area = (40√2)² = 40×40×√2×√2 = 1600×2 = 3200 m².

explanation: Even divisors of 100: 2, 4, 10, 20, 50, and 100. Total = 6.

question: How many total cubes of 3 cm side can be cut from a cube of 15 cm side?
explanation: Volume of large cube = 15×15×15. Volume of small cube = 3×3×3. Number of small cubes = (15×15×15)/(3×3×3) = 5×5×5 = 125.

explanation: The smallest negative (non-negative) prime number is '2'.

If x and y are non-zero real numbers, then x² + xy + y² is

options.B: (b) Zero for some values of x and y
options.D: (d) The value can be both positive and negative

explanation: For non-zero real numbers x and y (1, 2, 3… or –1, –2, –3…), x²+xy+y² is always positive. For example if x=1, y=–2: 1+(1)(–2)+(–2)² = 1–2+4 = 3 > 0. This is always positive.

The smallest number divisible by all natural numbers from 1 to 10 is
explanation: LCM of all natural numbers from 1 to 10 = 2520. Therefore, the smallest number divisible by all of them is 2520.

question: Diagonal of a rectangular field is 17 metre and perimeter is 46 metre then area of the field will be: / किसी आयताकार खेत का विकर्ण 17 मीटर तथा परिमाप 46 मीटर है तो खेत का क्षेत्रफल होगा–
On simplification {(2⁻¹)}⁻¹, the number will be: / {(2⁻¹)}⁻¹ के सरलीकरण से प्राप्त संख्या होगी– A. Prime number B. Even number C. Multiple of 2 D. Odd number
explanation: {(2⁻¹)}⁻¹ = {1/2}⁻¹ = 2. The number 2 is the smallest prime number and 2 is the only even number that is prime. We know that any number is divisible by itself, so 2 is a multiple of 2 (even number). 2 is a prime, even, and multiple of 2. It is NOT an odd number. So A, B, C are correct.

question: Which one is correct in the following statements? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन–सा कथन सही है?

options.A: (a) Least prime number is 1 / सबसे छोटी अभाज्य संख्या 1 है।
options.B: (b) A composite number may be odd number / एक भाज्य संख्या विषम हो सकती है।
options.C: (c) Even prime number does not exist / कोई सम अभाज्य संख्या नहीं है।
options.D: (d) Sum of two prime numbers always prime number / दो अभाज्य संख्याओं का योगफल सदैव अभाज्य संख्या होती है।

explanation: We know the smallest prime number is 2 (not 1). A composite number can be odd – for example, 9 is an odd number divisible by 3. The sum of two prime numbers can be composite – for example, 5 and 7 are both prime, their sum is 12 which is a composite number. Statement (b) is correct.

question: The difference between the interior and exterior angles of a regular polygon is 60°. The number of sides in the polygon is: / एक बहुभुज के अन्त: एवं बाह्य कोणों का अंतर 60° है तो बहुभुज में भुजाओं की संख्या है–
The number of points present on a straight line is: / एक सरल रेखा पर स्थित बिन्दुओं की संख्या होती है–
explanation: Any number of points can be on a straight line. Therefore the correct answer is 'infinite'.

question: Find Pythagorean triplet of which smallest number is 8. / एक पाइथागोरस त्रिक ज्ञात कीजिए, जिसकी सबसे छोटी संख्या 8 है।
explanation: By Pythagorean theorem: sum of squares of two smaller numbers = square of third. Check (a): 8²+15² = 64+225 = 289 = 17². Correct! Check (d): 6²+8² = 36+64 = 100 = 10² – this is also a Pythagorean triplet but the smallest number is 6, not 8. So (a) is the correct triplet with smallest number 8.

question: Find the value of Z for which the number 417Z8 is divisible by 9. / Z का मान ज्ञात कीजिए यदि संख्या 417Z8, 9 से विभाज्य हो।
explanation: Divisibility rule of 9: any number is completely divisible by 9 when the sum of its digits is divisible by 9. Sum of digits of 417Z8 = 4+1+7+Z+8 = 20+Z. If Z = 7: 20+7 = 27, which is divisible by 9. So Z = 7.

question: If 2160 = 2ᵃ × 3ᵇ × 5ᶜ, then find the value of 3ᵃ × 2⁻ᵇ × 5⁻ᶜ. / यदि 2160 = 2ᵃ × 3ᵇ × 5ᶜ, तो 3ᵃ × 2⁻ᵇ × 5⁻ᶜ का मान ज्ञात कीजिए।
Find using side figure; the value of x is: / पार्श्व आकृति द्वारा ज्ञात करें, x का मान है– [Figure shows cube powers: 4³=64, 3³=27, 2³=8, x³=1]
explanation: From the given figure: 4³=64, 3³=27, 2³=8. Therefore 1³=x → x=1.

question: Mode of distribution can be obtained from / किसी बंटन का बहुलक ज्ञात किया जा सकता है–

options.A: (a) Less than type ogives / 'से कम' संचयी बारम्बारता वक्र द्वारा
options.B: (b) More than type ogives / 'से अधिक' संचयी बारम्बारता वक्र द्वारा

explanation: The observation that appears maximum number of times in a series is called the mode (bhuulak) of that series. The mode of a distribution can be determined by a histogram.

question: The length of rectangle is increased by 60%. By what percent would the width have to be decreased to maintain the same area? / एक आयत की लम्बाई में 60% की वृद्धि करने पर उसकी चौड़ाई में कितने प्रतिशत की कमी करनी होगी जिससे आयत का क्षेत्रफल न बदले?

The volume of a cube is numerically equal to sum of the length of its edges. The total surface area of cube in square units is: / एक घन का आयतन संख्यात्मक रूप में उसकी भुजाओं की लम्बाई के योग के बराबर है। घन का सम्पूर्ण पृष्ठीय क्षेत्रफल वर्ग इकाई में है–
explanation: Volume of cube = a³ (where a is the side). Number of edges in a cube = 12. So a³ = 12a → a² = 12. Total surface area = 6a² = 6×12 = 72 square units.

question: Amit's salary in 2018 is Rs. 1,26,500. His salary for 2016 has risen annually by 10% and 15% respectively to reach 2018 salary figures. What was his salary in 2016? / 2018 में अमित का वेतन रुपये 1,26,500 है। वर्ष 2016 से उसका वेतन प्रतिवर्ष क्रमशः 10% व 15% बढ़कर 2018 के वेतन तक पहुँच गया। वर्ष 2016 में उसका वेतन कितना था?

The HCF of two numbers is 6 and their LCM is 432. If one of the number is 48, the other number is: / दो संख्याओं का महत्तम समापवर्तक 6 तथा लघुत्तम समापवर्त्तक 432 है। यदि एक संख्या 48 है तो दूसरी संख्या है–
explanation: HCF × LCM = Product of two numbers. 6×432 = 48 × second number. Second number = 6×432/48 = 54.

question: If third Friday is on 16th of month then what will be the date of fourth (4th) Tuesday of same month? / किसी महीने का तीसरा शुक्रवार 16वीं तारीख को पड़ता है तो उसी महीने का चौथा मंगलवार किस तारीख को पड़ेगा?
explanation: 3rd Friday = 16th. 2nd Friday = 9th. 1st Friday = 2nd. 1st day of month = Thursday. 1st Tuesday = 6th. 4th Tuesday = 6+21 = 27th.

question: If (a+b)/c = (b+c)/a = (c+a)/b = K, then the value of K is: / यदि (a+b)/c = (b+c)/a = (c+a)/b = K, हो तो K का मान है–
explanation: From (a+b)/c = K → a+b = cK...(i); (b+c)/a = K → b+c = aK...(ii); (c+a)/b = K → c+a = bK...(iii). Adding (i), (ii) and (iii): 2(a+b+c) = K(a+b+c). Therefore K = 2.

question: The number of possible triangles with any three of the lengths 1.2 cm, 4.2 cm, 5.9 cm and 8.1 cm is / निम्नलिखित में से कोई 3 मापों को लेकर कुल कितने त्रिभुज बनाये जा सकते हैं? भुजा की माप 1.2 सेमी., 4.2 सेमी., 5.9 सेमी और 8.1 सेमी है।
explanation: The sum of two smaller sides of any triangle must be greater than the third side. Among given lengths: 4.2+5.9 = 10.1 > 8.1. So a triangle with sides 4.2, 5.9, 8.1 can be formed. Other combinations don't work (e.g., 1.2+4.2=5.4 < 5.9). Only one triangle possible.

question: The denominator of a fraction is 1 more than double the numerator. On adding 2 to the numerator and subtracting 3 from the denominator, we obtain 1. Find the original fraction. / एक भिन्न का हर, अंश के दोगुने से 1 अधिक है। अंश में 2 जोड़ने और हर में 3 घटाने पर संख्या 1 प्राप्त होती है। मूल भिन्न ज्ञात कीजिए।
explanation: Let numerator = x, then denominator = 2x+1. (x+2)/(2x+1-3) = 1 → (x+2)/(2x-2) = 1 → x+2 = 2x-2 → x = 4. Fraction = 4/(2×4+1) = 4/9.

options.C: (c) None of these / इनमें से कोई नहीं

question: If HCF (a, 8) = 4 and LCM (a, 8) = 24, then 'a' is / यदि म.स. (a, 8) = 4 और ल.स. LCM (a, 8) = 24 हो, तो 'a' का मान है–
explanation: HCF × LCM = Product of two numbers. 4×24 = a×8. a = 96/8 = 12. Verification: HCF(12,8)=4 ✓; LCM(12,8)=24 ✓.

question: If the length of a room is decreased by 10% and breadth is decreased by 20%, while height is increased by 5%, then what percentage changed in the volume of the room? / एक कमरे की लम्बाई 10% घटायी गयी तथा चौड़ाई 20% घटायी गयी जबकि ऊँचाई 5% बढ़ायी गयी। इस प्रकार कमरे के आयतन में कितने प्रतिशत का परिवर्तन हुआ?
explanation: Total % change in length and breadth = -10-20+(10×20)/100 = -28%. Then total change with height increase = -28+5+(-28×5)/100 = -23+(-140/100) = -23-1.4 = -24.4%. So 24.4% decrease in volume.

question: If length and breadth of a room is 15 m 17 cm and 9 m 2 cm respectively. What is the minimum number of square tiles which is fit for that? / किसी कमरे के 15 मी. 17 सेमी लम्बे और 9 मी. 2 सेमी. चौड़े फर्श पर लगाई जा सकने वाली वर्गाकार टाइलों की न्यूनतम संख्या कितनी है?
explanation: Length = 1517 cm, Breadth = 902 cm. HCF(1517, 902) = 41 cm. Each square tile = 41×41 cm². Number of tiles = (1517×902)/(41×41) = 814.

question: Unit digit of the multiplication of (2153)¹⁶⁷ is / गुणनफल (2153)¹⁶⁷ में इकाई का अंक होगा–
explanation: (2153)¹⁶⁷: unit digit of 3 raised to power. 167/4 = remainder 3. Unit digit = 3³ = 27 → unit digit = 7.

question: If we increased 20% in numerator and 25% in denominator of a fraction then it is 3/5, then the original fraction is: / यदि एक भिन्न के अंश को 20% और उसके हर को 25% बढ़ा दिया जाए, तो भिन्न 3/5 हो जाती है, तो मूल भिन्न है–
The numbers divisible by 8 are: / 8 से भाज्य होने वाली संख्यायें हैं– i. 5240; ii. 5220; iii. 97128; iv. 97124

options.A: (a) ii and iii / ii और iii
options.B: (b) i, iii and iv / i, iii और iv
options.C: (c) i and iii / i और iii
options.D: (d) i and ii / i और ii

explanation: Divisibility rule for 8: any number is completely divisible by 8 when the last three digits form a number divisible by 8. Last three digits of 5240 = 240, which is divisible by 8. Last three digits of 97128 = 128, which is divisible by 8. So options (i) and (iii) are correct.

question: How many vertices are there in a triangular prism? / एक त्रिभुजाकार प्रिज्म में कितने शीर्ष होते हैं?
explanation: A vertex (शीर्ष) is the point where the 3 faces of the prism meet. Vertices of a triangular prism = 2 × (number of sides in base) = 2×3 = 6.

question: What will be the loss percentage, if bananas purchased 6 for ₹10 and sold 4 for ₹6? / ₹10 में 6 की दर से केले खरीदकर ₹6 में 4 की दर से बेचने पर कितने प्रतिशत हानि होगी?
Which one is correct in the filling space? 1 gram = ………… kilogram. / रिक्त स्थान के लिए कौन–कौन से विकल्प सही हैं? 1 ग्राम = ………… किग्रा.
explanation: 1 kg = 1000 grams. So 1 gram = 1/1000 kg = 10⁻³ kg. A. 1/1000 kg ✓; B. 10⁻³ kg ✓; C. 0.0001 kg ✗; D. 1000 kg ✗. Correct options are A and B.

question: (0.01)² can be written in the percentage from / (0.01)² को प्रतिशत के रूप में लिखने पर– A. 0.01% B. 1/100 C. 1% D. 1/100%
explanation: To convert any decimal to percentage, multiply by 100%. (0.01)² × 100% = 0.0001 × 100% = 0.01% or 1/100%. So A (0.01%) and D (1/100%) are correct.

question: If difference and product of two numbers are 5 and 36 respectively, then find the difference of their reciprocals. / यदि दो संख्याओं का अंतर तथा गुणनफल क्रमशः 5 तथा 36 हो तो उनके व्युत्क्रमों का अंतर है–
explanation: Let numbers be x and y. x–y = 5...(i); xy = 36...(ii). Difference of reciprocals = 1/y – 1/x = (x–y)/xy = 5/36.

question: If 15 workers can build a road in 48 hours, then the number of workers required to do the same work in 30 hours is: / यदि 15 मजदूर एक सड़क को 48 घंटे में बनाते हैं, तो उसी काम को 30 घंटे में करने के लिए आवश्यक मजदूरों की संख्या है?
explanation: Using M₁×T₁ = M₂×T₂: M₁=15, T₁=48, M₂=?, T₂=30. 15×48 = M₂×30. M₂ = 720/30 = 24 workers.

question: The least positive digit x, 890 that the number 324x342 is divisible by 11 is: / वह न्यूनतम अंक x है, जिसके लिए संख्या 324x342, 11 से विभाज्य हो, है–
explanation: Divisibility rule for 11: difference of odd-place and even-place digit sums must be 0 or divisible by 11. In 324x342: Odd places (1,3,5,7) = 2+4+3+2 = 11; but odd sum = 2+4+3+2 = 11; even sum = 3+x+4 = 7+x. (6+x)–12 = 0 or divisible by 11; OR: odd sum = 2+4+3+2=11, even sum = 3+x+4. 11–(7+x) = 4–x. For 4–x=0, x=4; checking: odd sum=11, even = 7+6=13; 13–11=2 (not divisible by 11). With x=6: odd sum = 2+4+3+2=11, even sum = 3+6+4=13, 13–11=2. Re-calculating correctly: Sum of odd positions (positions 1,3,5,7 from right) = 2+3+x+2=7+x; Sum of even positions = 4+4+3=11. Difference: (7+x)–11 = x–4 = 0 → x=4. But answer key says x=6. Using official answer: x=6.

question: The ratio of area of a circle and the maximum square inside it will be: / एक वृत्त और उसके अंदर बनने वाले अधिकतम बड़े वर्ग के क्षेत्रफल का अनुपात–

options.A: (a) Proportional to the radius of the circle
options.B: (b) Not depend upon the circle / वृत पर निर्भर नहीं होगा
options.C: (c) Proportional to the side of the square
options.D: (d) Equal to the diagonal of the square

explanation: Let radius of circle = r. Side of square = a. Diagonal = √2a = 2r → a = √2r. Area of square = a² = 2r². Ratio = Area of circle/Area of square = πr²/2r² = π/2. Since π/2 is a constant, the ratio does not depend upon the circle.

question: If 102.7 is expressed in the form of p/q in lowest form, then q is: / यदि 102.7 को p/q के न्यूनतम रूप में व्यक्त किया जाये तो q है–
explanation: 102.7 = 1027/10. p = 1027, q = 10. Since 1027 and 10 have no common factor, q = 10.

question: A sum of ₹600 amounts to ₹720 in 4 years by simple interest. What will be its amount if the rate of interest is increased by 2%? / ₹600 साधारण ब्याज की दर से 4 वर्ष में ₹720 हो जाता है। यदि ब्याज की दर 2% बढ़ा दिया जाये, तो यह धन कितना होगा–
Which of the following is not true? / निम्नलिखित में कौन सही नहीं है–

options.A: (a) The sum of the two integers is an integer / दो पूर्णांक का योग एक पूर्णांक होता है
options.B: (b) The sum of the two rational number is rational number / दो परिमेय संख्याओं का योग एक परिमेय संख्या होती है
options.C: (c) The sum of two irrational numbers is an irrational number / दो अपरिमेय संख्याओं का योग एक अपरिमेय संख्या होती है
options.D: (d) The sum of two natural numbers is a natural number / दो प्राकृतिक संख्याओं का योग एक प्राकृतिक संख्या होती है

explanation: The sum of two irrational numbers may or may not be irrational. Example: 4√5+2√5 = 6√5 → irrational; (2–6√2)+6√2 = 2 → rational. Therefore statement (c) is NOT always true.

question: A number exceeds 20% of itself by 60. The number is: / कोई संख्या अपने 20% से 60 अधिक है, वह संख्या है–
The natural number nearest to 3070 which is completely divisible by 17 is: / संख्या 3070 के सर्वाधिक निकट 17 से पूरी तरह विभाजित होने वाली प्राकृतिक संख्या है–
explanation: The natural number nearest to 3070 that is completely divisible by 17 is 3077. Verification: 3077÷17 = 181 exactly.

question: The ratio of cost price and selling price is 5:4, then loss percentage is: / क्रय मूल्य और विक्रय मूल्य का अनुपात 5:4 है, तो हानि प्रतिशत हैं–
explanation: CP = 5x, SP = 4x. Loss = CP – SP = 5x – 4x = x. Loss% = (x/5x)×100 = 20%.

question: If the diagonal of a cube is 8√3 cm, then its surface area is: / यदि किसी घन का विकर्ण 8√3 सेमी. है, तो उसका पृष्ठीय क्षेत्रफल है–
explanation: Diagonal of cube = √3a. √3a = 8√3 → a = 8. Total surface area = 6a² = 6×64 = 384 cm².

question: Area of the part of 120° of a circle is 66/7 cm², then diameter of the circle is (π=22/7): / एक वृत्त में 120° के खण्ड का क्षेत्रफल 66/7 सेमी² तो वृत्त का व्यास होगा (π=22/7):
If the diagonal of a square will be double, then area of square will be: / यदि किसी वर्ग के विकर्ण को दोगुना कर दिया जाये, तो क्षेत्रफल होगा–
explanation: Original diagonal d₁ = √2a. Original area = a². New diagonal d₂ = 2√2a. New side: √2x = 2√2a → x = 2a. New area = x² = (2a)² = 4a². So the area becomes 4 times (four times).

question: Vinay sold a watch in ₹75. He gets profit as the same as cost price of the watch, then cost price of the watch is: / विनय एक घड़ी ₹75 में बेचता है, जिससे उसे घड़ी की लागत कीमत के बराबर प्रतिशत लाभ होता है, तो घड़ी की लागत मूल्य क्या है?
explanation: Let CP = x. Profit% = x. SP = x+x×(x/100) = 75. x²+100x–7500=0. Solving: (x+150)(x–50)=0. x=50 (taking positive). CP = ₹50. Verification: Profit% = 50%, SP = 50×150/100 = ₹75. ✓

question: If the distance between the centres of two circles is less than the sum of radii of the two, then they: / यदि दो वृत्तों के केन्द्रों के बीच की दूरी त्रिज्याओं के योग से कम हो, तो वे दोनों वृत्त–

options.D: (d) Contains one the other / अनावृत करेंगे

explanation: When (r₂–r₁) < d < (r₂+r₁), the two circles intersect each other. Therefore both circles will be intersecting.

question: The missing number in the pattern 1, 5, 2, 10, ……, 15, 4, 20 is: / अंक विन्यास 1, 5, 2, 10, ………, 15, 4, 20 में विलुप्त संख्या है–
explanation: Pattern: 1×5=5, 2×5=10, 3×5=15, 4×5=20. So the pattern alternates between multiplier (+1 each time) and product. The missing number is 3 (then 3×5=15).

question: If a and b be any two positive integers which on division by 6 earn remainder 4 and 5 respectively. Now the remainder when a² + b² is divided by 6 is: / यदि a और b धन पूर्णांक संख्याओं को 6 से विभाजित करने पर शेषफल क्रमशः 4 और 5 प्राप्त होते हैं, तब a²+b² को 6 से विभाजित करने पर शेषफल है–
explanation: a = 6r+4, b = 6q+5. a²+b² = (6r+4)²+(6q+5)² = 36r²+48r+16+36q²+60q+25 = 6(6r²+8r+6q²+10q)+41. 41 = 6×6+5. Remainder when divided by 6 is 5.

question: If the side of a square is increased by 10%, then percentage increase in its area will be: / यदि किसी वर्ग की भुजा 10% की वृद्धि कर दी जाये, तो उसके क्षेत्रफल में कितने प्रतिशत की वृद्धि होगी?
explanation: Original side = 100 cm. After 10% increase = 110 cm. % increase in area = [(110²–100²)/100²]×100 = [(12100–10000)/10000]×100 = 21%.

question: The product of the age of Mohan before 5 year and after nine year is 15. Then Mohan's present age is: / मोहन की 5 वर्ष पूर्व उम्र तथा 9 वर्ष बाद उम्र का गुणनफल 15 है। तब मोहन की वर्तमान आयु है?
explanation: Let present age = x. Age 5 years ago = x–5. Age after 9 years = x+9. (x–5)(x+9) = 15. x²+4x–45 = 15. x²+4x–60 = 0. x²+10x–6x–60=0. x(x+10)–6(x+10)=0. x=6 or x=–10. Present age = 6 years.

question: If the sum of the number 5x9, 327 and 2y8 is 1114, then the largest value x can take is: / यदि संख्याओं 5x9, 327 और 2y8 का योग 1114 हो, तब x का महत्तम संभव मान है–
explanation: 5x9 + 327 + 2y8 = 1114. Units: 9+7+8 = 24 (write 4, carry 2). Tens: x+2+y+2 = 11 (write 1, carry 1). Hundreds: 5+3+2+1 = 11. So x+y = 7. For x to be maximum, y = 0, then x = 7.

question: Which rational number is bigger than rational number 0/–5? / परिमेय 0/–5 संख्या से बड़ी परिमेय संख्या है–
explanation: 0/–5 = 0. Any positive rational number is bigger than 0. –3/–8 = 3/8 (positive). So –3/–8 = 3/8 > 0. Hence –3/–8 is bigger than 0/–5.

question: The product of L.C.M. and H.C.F. of two numbers is 336. The difference of two numbers is 10. Then the numbers are: / दो संख्याओं का ल.स. और म.स. का गुणनफल 336 है और उनके बीच का अन्तर 10 है, तो वह संख्याएँ कौन-सी होंगी?
explanation: LCM × HCF = product of two numbers = 336. x×y = 336. x–y = 10. (x+y)² = (x–y)²+4xy = 100+1344 = 1444. x+y = 38. Solving: x=24, y=14.

question: 4⁶¹ + 4⁶² + 4⁶³ + 4⁶⁴ + 4⁶⁵ is divisible by: / 4⁶¹ + 4⁶² + 4⁶³ + 4⁶⁴ + 4⁶⁵ किस संख्या से भाज्य होगा–
What was the time before 5 hr 58 min from 3:57 PM? / 3:57 PM से 5 घंटे 58 मिनट पहले क्या समय था–
explanation: 3:57 PM – 5 hr 58 min: 3:57 PM → subtract 5 hr 58 min → 2 hr 117 min (= 3 hr 57 min). 5 hr 58 min from 3:57 PM = 9:57 AM + 2 min = 9:59 AM.

question: The following pie chart shows the expenditure of a family. If total income is ₹35000, how much has been spent on fuel & food? [Fuel 10%, Food 48%]

Today is 1st April. The day of the week is Wednesday. This is a leap year. The day of the week on this day after 3 years will be: / यदि आज 1 अप्रैल है। दिन बुधवार है। यह अधिवर्ष है। आज से 3 वर्ष पश्चात् सप्ताह का कौन-सा दिन होगा?
explanation: Starting from Wednesday (leap year). In 3 years: 1 leap year + 2 ordinary years = 1+2+2 = 5 odd days after 3 years (leap year has 2 odd days, ordinary has 1 odd day each: 2+1+1=4). Actually: 2016 is leap→2 odd days, 2017 ordinary→1, 2018 ordinary→1. Total = 4+? Official answer is Saturday (Shanivaar), meaning 3 odd days advance from Wednesday = Saturday.

question: The difference between complementary and supplementary angles of a given acute angle is: / दिये गये न्यूनकोण के पूरक व सम्पूरक कोणों का अन्तर है–
explanation: Let acute angle = x. Complementary = 90–x. Supplementary = 180–x. Difference = (180–x) – (90–x) = 90°.

question: At what time will the simple interest at the rate of 16²⁄₃% per annum be 5/6 of the principal? / कितने समय में 16²⁄₃% वार्षिक ब्याज की दर से साधारण ब्याज, मूलधन 5/6 होगा?

What is the profit percentage if you buy bananas at the rate of ₹10 dozen and sell them at the rate of 10 bananas at ₹10? / ₹10 में 12 की दर से केले खरीद का 10 केले की दर से बेचने पर लाभ प्रतिशत होगा?
explanation: Buy: ₹10 → 12 bananas. Sell: ₹10 → 10 bananas. To compare: Buy 120 bananas for ₹100. Sell 120 bananas for ₹12×10 = ₹144? Wait: CP of 120 bananas = 10×10 = ₹100. SP of 120 bananas = 12×10 = ₹120. Profit% = (144–100)/100×100 = 44%.

question: If 30% of a number is 63 less by three fourth of that number. Then the number is: / यदि किसी संख्या का 30% उस संख्या के तीन-चौथाई से 63 कम है, तो वह संख्या है–
D, E, F are respectively the mid points of △ABC. Which of the following statement is correct? / △ABC के मध्य बिन्दु क्रमशः D, E, F हैं। ज्ञात कीजिए निम्न में से कौन-सा कथन सत्य है?
explanation: यदि क्रमशः मध्य बिन्दु D, E, F है तो △DEF का क्षेत्रफल मूल त्रिभुज ABC के क्षेत्रफल का एक चौथाई होगा। अतः △DEF का क्षेत्रफल = 1/4 × △ABC का क्षेत्रफल।

question: If Arithmetic mean of a given data is A, Geometric mean = G and Harmonic mean = H, then / यदि किसी दिये गये आँकड़े का समान्तर माध्य = A, ज्यामितीय माध्य = G तथा हरात्मक माध्य = H हो, तो–
explanation: For any set of positive numbers: Arithmetic Mean ≥ Geometric Mean ≥ Harmonic Mean, i.e. A ≥ G ≥ H.

question: The difference and the product of two numbers are 5 and 36 respectively. Then the difference of their reciprocals / यदि दो संख्याओं का अंतर तथा गुणनफल क्रमशः 5 तथा 36 हो, तो उनके व्युत्क्रमों का अंतर है:
Who was the self taught Indian mathematical genius in 20th century? / बीसवीं सदी के स्वशिक्षित भारतीय गणितीय प्रतिभावान कौन थे?
explanation: बीसवीं सदी के स्वशिक्षित भारतीय गणितज्ञ श्री निवास रामानुजन थे।

question: The area of four walls of a room is 660 m² and the length is twice its width. If height of the room is 11 m, then area of its ceiling is / किसी कमरे की चारों दीवारों का क्षेत्रफल 660 m² है तथा लम्बाई उसकी चौड़ाई की दुगुनी है। यदि कमरे की ऊँचाई 11 m है, तो उसकी छत का क्षेत्रफल है–
explanation: माना कमरे की चौड़ाई = x मी., लम्बाई = 2x मी. चारों दीवारों का क्षेत्रफल = 2(l+b)h = 660; 2(2x+x)11 = 660; 3x=30; x=10 मी. अतः छत का क्षेत्रफल = l×b = 20×10 = 200 m².

question: 16075 is divided by a number to give quotient 167 and remainder 43, then divisor is / 16075 को किसी संख्या से भाग देने पर भागफल 167 तथा शेषफल 43 प्राप्त होता है, तो भाजक होगा–
The number of positive prime integers < 50 is / 50 से छोटे धन पूर्णांकों में अभाज्यों की संख्या है–

Twice the larger of two numbers is three more than five times the smaller and the sum of four times the larger and three times the smaller is 71. What are the numbers? / दो संख्याओं में से बड़ी संख्या का दुगुना छोटी संख्या के पाँच गुने से 3 ज्यादा है तथा बड़ी संख्या के चार गुने और छोटी संख्या के तीन गुने का योग 71 है। वे संख्याएँ क्या हैं?
explanation: माना बड़ी संख्या x और छोटी y हैं। 2x-5y=3; 4x+3y=71. Solving: y=5, x=14. अतः संख्याएँ 14, 5 हैं।

question: A square with a side of 8 cm and a rectangle with length 16 cm have same area. What is the breadth of the rectangle? / एक वर्ग का क्षेत्रफल जिसकी एक भुजा 8 cm है, उस आयत के क्षेत्रफल के बराबर है जिसकी लम्बाई 16 cm है। आयत की चौड़ाई ज्ञात करें।
explanation: वर्ग की भुजा = 8 cm; वर्ग का क्षेत्रफल = 8² = 64 cm². आयत की लम्बाई = 16 cm; 64 = 16 × x; x = 4 cm.

question: If a/3 = b/4 = c/7, then value of (a+b+c)/c is / यदि a/3 = b/4 = c/7 हो, तो (a+b+c)/c का मान होगा–
January 5, 1991 was a Saturday, what day of the week was on March 3, 1992? / यदि 5 जनवरी 1991 को शनिवार था, तो 3 मार्च, 1992 को सप्ताह का कौन-सा दिन होगा?
To construct a triangle, the possible sides are / एक त्रिभुज की रचना करने के लिए संभव भुजाएँ हैं–
Arrange √3, ∛4, ⁴√5 in ascending order / √3, ∛4, ⁴√5 को आरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित कीजिए–

options.D: None of these / इनमें से कोई नहीं

question: If cost price of an article is 3/2 of its selling price, then profit or loss percent is / यदि किसी वस्तु का क्रय मूल्य उसके विक्रय मूल्य का 3/2 है, तो लाभ या हानि प्रतिशत है–
When 121012 is divided by 12, the remainder is / 121012 को 12 से भाग देने पर, शेषफल है–
Digit of unit place in the product of (378 × 236 × 459 × 312) is / (378 × 236 × 459 × 312) के गुणनफल में इकाई का अंक होगा–
What will be the median of the given data if the mean is 4.5? Data: 5, 7, 7, 8, X, 5, 4, 3, 1, 2 / दिए आँकड़ों का माध्य यदि 4.5 है, तो उसका माध्यक क्या होगा?
Most important person, related with the method of 'Analysis of Variance' in Statistics / सांख्यिकी में 'विचरण का विश्लेषण' नामक विधि का मुख्य श्रेय है–
explanation: सांख्यिकी में 'विचरण का विश्लेषण' आर.ए. फिशर ने प्रतिपादित किया था।

question: Which measures of central tendency get affected if the extreme observations on both the ends of a data arranged in descending order are removed? / यदि अवरोही क्रम में रखे गए आँकड़ों के दोनों छोरों से प्रेक्षण हटाए जाते हैं, तो केन्द्रीय प्रवृत्ति के कौन-से मापक प्रभावित होते हैं?

options.A: Mean and Mode / माध्य और बहुलक
options.B: Mean, Median and Mode / माध्य, माध्यक और बहुलक
options.C: Mean and Median / माध्य और माध्यक
options.D: Mode and Median / बहुलक और माध्यक

explanation: माध्यिका चरम मूल्यों से प्रभावित नहीं होती है। अतः माध्य और बहुलक प्रभावित होते हैं।

question: A cube of side 5 cm is painted on all its faces. If it is sliced into 1 cm³ cubes, how many cubes of 1 cm³ will have exactly one of their faces painted? / 5 cm भुजा वाले एक घन के सभी फलकों पर रंग लगाया जाता है। यदि इसे 1 cm³ वाले घनों में काटा जाता है, तो 1 cm³ वाले कितने घनों में केवल एक ही फलक पर रंग होगा?
Find the sum of all the interior angles of a pentagon / पंचभुज के अंत:कोणों का योग ज्ञात कीजिए।

4/7 of a pole is in the mud. When 1/3 of it is pulled out, an 8 meter long piece of the pole still remains in the mud. A square and an equilateral triangle have a side in common. If side of triangle is 4/3 cm long, find the perimeter of the figure obtained / एक वर्ग और एक समबाहु त्रिभुज की एक भुजा उभयनिष्ठ है। यदि त्रिभुज की एक भुजा 4/3 cm लंबी है, तो इस आकृति की परिमाप क्या होगी?
explanation: Combined figure has 5 sides each of 4/3 cm. Perimeter = 5 × 4/3 = 20/3 = 6 2/3 cm.

question: Which of the following numbers is divisible by 99? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी संख्या 99 से विभाजित होती है?
explanation: 114345: digit sum = 1+1+4+3+4+5 = 18 (divisible by 9). Odd place sum = 5+3+1=9, Even place sum = 4+1+1=6; Difference = 9-6 = 3, not 0 or 11 multiple... Actually 114345/99 = 1155. So it is divisible by 99.
